No. 334 (E), dated 07.02.2013, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), namely: (i) Point 1 of Notes after Table 1 & 2 shall stand revised as under: The fee levied and collected hereunder shall be due and payable at the following Toll Plazas for the distance specified for such Toll Plaza(s): Location of Toll Plaza(s)(chainage) Length (in km) for which Fee is payable Km. 51.250 (Design Chainage) (Existing Chainage km. 53.900) near Gadoi village in Dist. Junagadh 38.800 Km. 108.980 (Design Chainage) (Existing Chainage km. 113.540) near Dari village in Dist. Gir Somnath 48.790 (iii) Point 2 of Notes after Table 1 & 2 shall stand revised as under: In addition to above, the fee as per Table 2 above shall also be due and payable for the use of the following bypass (es) at the following Toll Plaza(s) specified for such Toll Plaza(s): -- 2 of 3 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3 (ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 3 Location of Toll Plaza(s) (chainage) Length of bypass (in km.) for which additional fee is payable Name of Structure Length (in km.) Cost (in Rs. Crore) Km. 51.250 (Design Chainage) (Existing Chainage km. 53.900) near Gadoi village in Dist. Junagadh Jetpur bypass taking off at km. 0.000 (design chainage) and joining at km. 4.700 (design chainage) of NH-8D 4.700 68.85 Junagadh bypass taking off at km. 20.850 (design chainage) and joining at km. 40.650 (design chainage) of NH-8D 19.800 100.00 Km. 108.980 (Design Chainage) (Existing Chainage km. 113.540) near Dari village in Dist. Gir Somnath Keshod bypass taking off at km. 63.600 (design chainage) and joining at km. 75.000 (design chainage) of NH-8D 11.400 63.70 [F.
